caption: The video shows a person playing a game, likely FIFA Ultimate Team, as indicated by the "UT" logo on the packs. The player is navigating through their unopened packs, which include various types of presents such as "Lovely Present," "Blitz Present," and others. The screen displays the player's in-game currency and level information, showing they have 173,037 coins, 14,600 points, and 2,343,543 overall rating with a level of 19. The player appears to be excited or surprised, as suggested by their open mouth and animated expression. The background includes a Christmas tree, indicating that the video might have been recorded during the holiday season. The player seems to be preparing to open one of the packs, specifically highlighting the "Lovely Present."
